purpose: Preserve the existing The Dragon's Touch strategy thought process before the strategy knowledge base replaces it.
core_preservation_rule: Do not lose useful behavior from the current strategy system while migrating to strategy_knowledge.

cut_logic: possible cut versus recommended cut distinction
bad card versus wrong card distinction
low power versus low synergy distinction
protection_logic: tribal density / typal payoff manual review protection
replacement_logic: avoid replacements that fight the deck plan
build_from_collection_logic: nonbasic lands collection-first unless upgrades allowed
no final deck generation before allowed
report_language: clear caveats that possible cuts are not guaranteed cuts

known_strategy_lessons_to_preserve.lesson: A card can look weak by generic standards but belong because it supports the deck's actual engine.
new_strategy_knowledge_destination: Cards That Look Weak But Belong

known_strategy_lessons_to_preserve.lesson: A legal 100-card deck can still have optional optimization cuts; required cuts and optional cuts must stay separate.
Separate possible cuts from recommended cuts and label cut confidence.
Commander-created landfall or land-entry artifact-token packages must be recognized even when raw landfall density appears low.
new_strategy_knowledge_destination: Commander Traits That Support This Strategy

known_strategy_lessons_to_preserve.lesson: Strategy output must improve AI handoff prompt quality, not just produce human-readable flavor.
new_strategy_knowledge_destination: Integration Notes for The Dragon's Touch

known_strategy_lessons_to_preserve.lesson: Basic lands are assumed available; nonbasic lands remain collection-first unless outside upgrades are allowed.

Build From Collection scaffolding must not accidentally perform exact card selection, final deck inclusion, mana-base generation, or full deck generation before those features are intentionally unlocked.
new_strategy_knowledge_destination: Integration Notes for The Dragon's Touch

report_language: Integration Notes for The Dragon's Touch

minimum_required_before_replacement: old and new strategy outputs compared on representative decks
hard_blockers: new system cannot explain protected low-power synergy cards
new system cannot distinguish wrong-card-for-deck from bad-card
new system cannot preserve v1.3 Build From Collection boundaries

must_preserve_from_existing_system: current report wording that has proven useful
current Build From Collection B-E routing
current strategy lessons from v0.4 through v1.3
marker_hotfix_note: Added explicit preservation marker list required by v1.4.4 verifier.
